panels.alt: Noctyra resting as the corrupted crystal warning breaks
panels.caption: The warning breaks.

panels.alt: The restored Hatchery on Luma Isle
panels.caption: Luma Isle begins to answer again.

panels.text: Inside the corrupted crystal, Sava finds a symbol no Lumin craftsperson recognizes.

panels.alt: A restored route opening from Luma Isle
panels.caption: One route opens. Another answers.
